_comment: Phase-2 search ranges: the scoring / valuation constants ONLY. Phase-1 movement/pressure constants are intentionally absent (frozen at the adopted config.json/config_4p.json values; their ranges are archived in intervals_phase1.json). score_w_production is the scale anchor and is PINNED at 1.0 (NOT listed here) — the plan score is argmax-compared, so it has one redundant scale degree of freedom. default_strategy is {0=ScorePerShip, 1=ScoreFirst}; ProductionFirst is never the default. Identity defaults (reproduce pre-phase-2 play): score_w_ship_cost=1, score_w_final_ships=1, score_per_ship_smoothing=1, capture_min_score=0, score_enemy_capture_bonus=1, default_strategy=0.
